_readme: Copy this file to desktop/config/vault_config.json (gitignored) and fill in real values. Never commit the copy.
whitelist: extra always-allowed hosts beyond the current tab's top-level origin (e.g. CDNs your own site needs).
network_obfuscation.mode='socks5' chains ALL proxy traffic through upstream_host:upstream_port via SOCKS5.
Real SOCKS5 provider: set upstream_host/upstream_port/username/password to what your provider gave you.
WireGuard instead of a SOCKS5 provider: WireGuard itself is not a SOCKS5 proxy, so run a local SOCKS5 shim
bound to the wg interface and point upstream_host/port at that shim, e.g.:
1. wg-quick up wg0                                  # bring the tunnel up
2. run a local SOCKS5 shim that routes out through it, e.g. `microsocks -i 127.0.0.1 -p 1080`
(or any SOCKS5 server bound so its outbound egress is forced onto the wg0 route/table)
kill_switch: block all traffic when the tunnel is unhealthy. strict_killswitch: block even before any
tunnel has ever been configured/enabled (fail-closed by default instead of fail-open).
